# Phase 5 Closure Readiness Plan

This planning note records Phase 5 closure readiness concepts only. It is not an executable workflow.

## Closure Concepts

- Runtime authorization integrity review
- Execution governance integrity review
- Replay, audit, and trace integrity review
- Provider onboarding and migration integrity review
- Runtime safety integrity review
- Fail-closed integrity review
- Execution containment integrity review
- Legacy runtime segregation review
- Closure report review

## Boundaries

This plan does not create workflows, deployment automation, provider integrations, runtime communication, credentials, branch protection settings, route rewrites, route deletion, provider adapters, or automatic approvals.
